title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, August 24 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 24/08/2021
Image reference: 2021-08-24_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-24-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have softened. Small Chemical Tanker Bochem Antwerp (19,800 DWT, Nov 2011, Kitanihon Zosen) sold to Vietnamese buyers for USD 15.60 mil, VV value USD 15.24 mil - SS/DD Due. Small Clean Tanker Anuket Amber (9,500 DWT, Oct 2008, Zhejiang Shipbuilding) sold to First Ship Lease Trust for USD 5.00 mil, VV value USD 5.19 mil - Including Charter.
